song_name: Fifty Shades Of Grey - Earned It
version_description: Corrected chords in last chorus and outro. Added 7th's.

versions.song_name: Fifty Shades Of Grey - Earned It
Fifty Shades Of Grey - Earned It
versions.version_description: This version is with capo 3rd fret. This one also includes a riff just as played in the studio and acoustic version.

tuning: E A D G B E

pro_brother.song_name: Fifty Shades Of Grey - Earned It

content:
Many Dm/Gm chords can have 7th added depending on how much colour you want to add to the sound.

Moving bass notes in brackets

To maintain decending bass line, LAST CHORUS and OUTRO chords can be played as:

[ch]Dm[/ch]  - x5776x
[tab][ch]F/C[/ch] - x3356x
Bdim- x2343x[/tab]
[ch]A#[/ch]  - x1333x

[Intro]
[ch]Gm[/ch] [ch]Dm7[/ch] ([ch]D[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]F#[/ch])

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]
You make it look like it's magic[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                     ([ch]D[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]F#[/ch]) [ch]Gm[/ch]
Cause I see nobody, nobody but you, you, you[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Gm7[/ch]
I'm never confused[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
Hey, hey[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Dm7[/ch] ([ch]D[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]F#[/ch])
I'm so used to being used[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]
So I love when you call unexpected[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]
Cause I hate when the moment's expected[/tab]
[tab]  ([ch]D[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]F#[/ch])        [ch]Gm[/ch]
So I'ma care for you, you, you[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Dm7[/ch]
I'ma care for you, you, you, you, yeah[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]                  [ch]Gm[/ch]
Cause girl you're perfect[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Gm[/ch]      [ch]Gm7[/ch]
You're always worth it[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Dm7[/ch]
And you deserve it[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Dm7[/ch]    ([ch]D[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]F#[/ch])
The way you work it[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Gm[/ch]
Cause girl you earned it[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Dm7[/ch]
Girl you earned it[/tab]

[ch]Dm7[/ch] x6

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]
You know our love would be tragic[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]                   ([ch]D[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]F#[/ch])        [ch]Gm[/ch]
So you don't pay it, don't pay it no mind[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Gm[/ch]  [ch]Gm7[/ch]
We live with no lies[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Dm[/ch]
Hey, hey[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                          [ch]Dm7[/ch] ([ch]D[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]F#[/ch])
You're my favorite kind of night[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]
So I love when you call unexpected[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]
Cause I hate when the moment's expected[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Gm[/ch]
So I'ma care for you, you, you[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Dm7[/ch]
I'ma care for you, you, you, you, yeah[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]                 [ch]Gm[/ch]
Cause girl you're perfect[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Gm[/ch]     [ch]Gm7[/ch]
You're always worth it[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Dm7[/ch]
And you deserve it[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Dm7[/ch]    ([ch]D[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]F#[/ch])
The way you work it[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Gm[/ch]        [ch]Gm7[/ch]
Cause girl you earned it[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Dm7[/ch]
Girl you earned it[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]
On that lonely night[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]
You said it wouldn't be love[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
But we felt the rush[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]             ([ch]D[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]F#[/ch])          [ch]Gm[/ch]
It made us believe it there was only us[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]                        [ch]Dm[/ch]     [ch]F/C[/ch]    [ch]Bdim[/ch] 
Convinced we were broken inside...[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]     [ch]F/C[/ch]   [ch]Bdim[/ch] 
Inside...[/tab]

[LAST CHORUS]
[tab]                   [ch]Dm[/ch]    [ch]F/C[/ch]
Cause girl you're perfect[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Bdim[/ch]   [ch]A#[/ch]
You're always worth it[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]F/C[/ch]
And you deserve it[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Dm[/ch]     [ch]F/C[/ch]
The way you work it[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Bdim[/ch]   [ch]A#[/ch]
Cause girl you earned it[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]F/C[/ch]  [ch]Bdim[/ch]  [ch]A#[/ch]  [ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]F/C[/ch]  [ch]Bdim[/ch]  [ch]A#[/ch]
Girl you earned...[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]F/C[/ch]  [ch]Bdim[/ch]  [ch]A#[/ch]
it[/tab]

[Outro]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]F/C[/ch]  [ch]Bdim[/ch]  [ch]A#[/ch] 
(repeat till fade out)[/tab]
